posture: 19 roles · 6 strong-act · 1 interim (Shippit FC) plus 4 recruiter-held senior risk/governance roles worth fast contact — senior-manager risk/governance weighted as core-target matches
summary: Monday afternoon Chrome-verified refresh of the morning scan. The strong recruiter-held senior risk/governance cluster is all still live: Chief Risk Officer at Revesby Workers' Club, Senior Manager Finance Risk/Controls/Governance at Cuscal, plus Oxygen (Senior Manager Governance & Enablement), Perigon (Senior Manager Risk & Resilience) and Ethos BeathChapman (Senior Risk Manager). The Shippit interim Financial Controller (contract to ~March 2027) remains live. Change since this morning: the Governance Institute GM (Business Performance & Operations) has closed and was dropped. New this afternoon: a Compliance Manager at HCF (Australia's largest not-for-profit health fund) supporting APRA/ASIC obligations — plain Manager level but a clean insurance/mutual sector fit. The Munich Re reinsurance Risk Manager, Autosports internal-audit manager, Bosch Head of Controlling and Essential Selection Head of Treasury Risk all remain live. Reader note: with interim/contract activity concentrated in the risk/finance specialists, the highest-value move is being registered and CV-current with Bluefin, Kaizen, JS Careers, KPP, Robert Half and Sharp & Carter. Coverage caveat: Seek/I Work for NSW are sampled via keyword batteries read most-recent-first, so older-but-live roles can sit below the fold and a manual look remains worthwhile. Browser-verified this run: Seek (risk/governance/interim-finance most-recent batteries plus per-role live checks). AICD is teaser-only (member-gated).

items.headline: Independent Chairs & Members, Audit & Risk Committees — NSW Government (Sydney, prequalification panel)
items.summary: Standing NSW Government scheme (ProcurePoint SCM2421) that prequalifies independent chairs and members for the audit and risk committees of NSW departments and statutory bodies, overseeing internal audit, risk management and internal controls.
items.so_what: Direct fit to your FAICD + audit/risk/governance profile and existing committee experience; joining the register positions you for multiple NSW committee appointments. Apply to the panel rather than a single dated vacancy.

items.headline: Company Secretary — Sydney organisation via Profusion PAC (Sydney)
items.summary: Recruiter-held company secretary role in Sydney supporting board governance, statutory compliance and company-secretarial administration. Advertised through Profusion PAC. Still live this run.
items.so_what: Board-level company-secretarial work aligns with your FAICD/governance background and committee experience; a foot in the boardroom on the management side. Contact the recruiter to confirm scope and seniority.

items.headline: Non-Executive Director vacancies across AU sectors — Board Direction listing platform
items.summary: Board Direction maintains Australia's largest public NED list (Commercial, Government and NFP), refreshed roughly fortnightly, spanning Banking & Insurance, Education, Health, Energy, Environment and Welfare across all states with closing dates through July-August.
items.so_what: Worth a scan for interstate board seats (monthly-travel cadence acceptable per your rule); filter for FS/insurance/energy/government affinity. No single isolated Sydney role today — browse the live list.

items.headline: Directorship Opportunities — ~80 live board roles nationally (AICD, member-gated)
items.summary: AICD's Directorship Opportunities platform features 80+ board vacancies and adds ~15 new positions a week from thousands of registered organisations. Only public teasers are visible without a member subscription (~$85-88/yr).
items.so_what: As an FAICD this is your richest board pipeline; teasers only here. Worth a manual look in DO this week to filter by sector/location and apply directly — log in on your own account.

items.headline: Chief Risk Officer (CRO) — Revesby Workers' Club, Revesby (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Permanent executive role owning the enterprise risk function at a large registered club/hospitality group in south-west Sydney — building and running the risk, compliance and assurance framework and reporting to the board/CEO. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Bullseye for your CRO target and risk/governance specialisation, and a board-facing C-suite seat in Sydney metro. Strong direct match — apply now and reference your FCPA/FAICD and StateCover/Ku-ring-gai governance experience.

items.headline: Senior Manager, Finance Risk, Controls & Governance — Cuscal, Sydney
items.summary: Permanent senior-manager role at payments/financial-services group Cuscal, leading the finance risk, controls and governance agenda across the finance function. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Core-target Senior Manager role combining finance, risk, controls and governance — a near-exact map to your profile and FCPA. Strong FS-sector match; apply directly.

items.headline: Senior Manager, Governance and Enablement — recruiter-held, Sydney (Oxygen Recruitment & HR)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent senior-manager governance role (hybrid Sydney) covering governance frameworks, enablement and assurance. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Senior-manager governance is core-target for you; recruiter-held roles move fast. Contact the consultant today and reference your FAICD and board/committee experience.

items.headline: Senior Manager — Risk & Resilience — recruiter-held, Sydney (Perigon Group)
items.summary: Recruiter-held permanent senior-manager role (hybrid Sydney) owning enterprise risk and operational/business resilience. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Direct senior-manager risk match with a resilience angle that suits your utilities/insurance background; recruiter-held so act fast. Call Perigon and apply.

items.headline: Senior Risk Manager — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ethos BeathChapman)
items.summary: Recruiter-held senior risk management role (hybrid Sydney) within financial services, leading enterprise/operational risk. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Senior Risk Manager is a core-target, direct match to your risk specialisation and FS affinity; recruiter-held, so make early contact and submit a current CV.

items.headline: Compliance Manager — HCF, Sydney (Hybrid)
items.summary: Compliance Manager at HCF (Australia's largest not-for-profit health fund) supporting APRA and ASIC regulatory obligations, owning the compliance management framework, regulatory affairs, incident management and compliance policies/training, working alongside the Senior Compliance Manager. Newly posted this afternoon.
items.so_what: Plain Manager level (lower priority, capped at watch) but a clean insurance/mutual sector fit to your StateCover/insurance background and FCPA, with strong APRA/ASIC regulatory exposure. Worth a look if you want a compliance seat in a large not-for-profit insurer.

items.headline: Head of Governance & Assurance — recruiter-held, Sydney (Ink Recruitment)
items.summary: Recruiter-held 'Head of' governance and assurance role (hybrid Sydney) leading the governance and assurance function. Still live this run, though it has been advertised for some weeks.
items.so_what: Strong 'Head of' governance fit for your FAICD profile; the longer time on market is the only caveat. Worth a call to the recruiter to check it is still open before investing in an application.

items.headline: Senior Controls Assurance Manager — Teachers Mutual Bank, Sydney
items.summary: Senior-manager role at Teachers Mutual Bank leading controls assurance and testing across the bank's risk and control environment. Posted within the last day.
items.so_what: Senior-manager assurance role with a strong mutual/FS sector fit to your StateCover/insurance background; slightly niche to controls-testing, so a judgement call against your broader governance focus.

items.headline: Risk Manager (Enterprise & P&C Reinsurance) — Munich Re, Sydney
items.summary: Risk manager role at reinsurer Munich Re covering enterprise risk and P&C reinsurance risk in the Sydney office.
items.so_what: Plain Manager level so lower priority, but the reinsurance/insurance sector is a direct fit to your mutual/insurance experience. Worth a look if you want a specialist risk seat in a global insurer.

items.headline: Internal Audit Manager — Autosports Group head office, Leichhardt (Sydney)
items.summary: Head-office internal audit manager role at automotive retail group Autosports Group, running the internal audit program across the group.
items.so_what: Plain Manager level (lower priority) but a clean internal-audit fit to your assurance/FCPA background and Sydney-metro location. A solid watch if you want a group internal-audit seat.

items.headline: Interim Financial Controller (contract to ~March 2027) — Shippit, Darling Point (Sydney)
items.summary: Interim/contract Financial Controller at logistics-tech scale-up Shippit, running the finance/control function on a fixed-term basis through to about March 2027. Confirmed live this run.
items.so_what: Direct interim contract match to your FCPA and financial-control depth; interim roles move fast, so apply today. Good day-rate/fixed-term option while you weigh permanent and board options.

items.headline: Head of Controlling — Bosch Rexroth, Kings Park (Sydney metro)
items.summary: Senior 'Head of' finance/controlling role at industrial-technology firm Bosch Rexroth, leading management accounting, controlling and financial performance for the local business.
items.so_what: Head-of-finance level role that fits your FCPA and finance-leadership target; industrial sector is adjacent rather than core, hence a watch. Sydney-metro location works.

items.headline: Head of Treasury Risk & Operations — Sydney (Essential Selection Partnership)
items.summary: Recruiter-held 'Head of' role covering treasury risk and treasury operations in Sydney, leading the treasury risk framework and operational processes.
items.so_what: Head-of role blending treasury, risk and operations — a good seniority and function fit, slightly specialist on the treasury side. Worth a recruiter conversation to gauge the broader risk/finance scope.

items.headline: Finance Manager — Infrastructure, Sydney (DMC Recruitment & Search)
items.summary: Recruiter-held finance manager role in the infrastructure sector, covering financial management and reporting for an infrastructure business.
items.so_what: Plain Finance Manager level so peripheral to your seniority, but the infrastructure/utilities adjacency fits your energy/utilities strength. Situational awareness only unless you want a hands-on finance role.

items.headline: Data Governance Manager — Harvey Norman, Silverwater (Sydney)
items.summary: Data governance manager role at Harvey Norman, leading data governance frameworks, data quality and stewardship across the retailer.
items.so_what: Plain Manager level and IT/data-governance focused rather than enterprise governance, so peripheral — situational awareness only. Sydney-metro location and a governance-adjacent function keep it on the radar.
